# Copilot Instructions - Tim Freelance Landing

This is an **Astro 6** + Tailwind CSS 3 static site for Tim Friedrich's Dynamics 365 freelancing services, deployed on GitHub Pages at `https://dynamics-tim.dev/`.

**Stack:** Astro 6 (SSG) В· TypeScript (strict) В· Tailwind CSS 3 В· MDX content collections В· GitHub Actions CI/CD

## Build & Run Commands

```bash
npm install       # Install + runs postinstall: generates OG image and favicons
npm run dev       # Dev server on :4321 with HMR
npm run build     # Production SSG build (HTML/CSS/JS/images compressed via astro-compress)
npm run preview   # Preview production build locally
npm run sync      # Regenerate TypeScript types from content collections вЂ” run after any schema/content change
npm run lint      # ESLint (TypeScript + Astro, --max-warnings 0)
npm run format    # Prettier with astro plugin
```

## Code Style

- Semicolons: yes В· Single quotes in TS, double quotes in `.astro` templates
- 2-space indent В· Trailing commas: es5 В· Max line width: 100 chars В· LF line endings
- Prefix unused variables with `_`
- Functions: camelCase В· Components/Interfaces: PascalCase
- Always define `interface Props` in Astro component frontmatter; destructure via `Astro.props as Props`
- Relative imports (`../components/`, `../layouts/`) вЂ” path aliases `@/*` exist but are not the convention

## Architecture

```
src/
  components/   Astro components (island architecture вЂ” minimal client-side JS)
  content/      MDX content collections: timeline/, projects/, certs/
  layouts/      BaseLayout.astro (SEO, CSP, font loading), SeoHead.astro (JSON-LD)
  pages/        Astro pages (SSG routes, trailingSlash: always)
  styles/       global.css вЂ” .card, .section-title, .nav-link CSS utilities
  data/         Static data files
public/         Static assets, CNAME (GitHub Pages custom domain)
scripts/        generate-og.mjs, generate-favicons.mjs (run on npm install)
```

**Key patterns:**
- Use `import.meta.env.BASE_URL` for all asset paths; use the `to()` helper for page routes (normalizes trailing slashes for GitHub Pages compatibility)
- The `to()` helper is currently duplicated across components вЂ” update all instances if modifying, or extract to a shared util
- React 18 is a peer dependency for Astro islands only вЂ” do not build standalone React components
- Font paths: `global.css` uses absolute `/assets/fonts/`; `BaseLayout.astro` uses `${base}assets/fonts/` вЂ” keep both in sync
- Use `data-reveal` / `data-reveal-delay` attributes for scroll-triggered animations

## Key Integrations

- **GitHub Pages** вЂ” deployed via `.github/workflows/deploy.yml` on main push
- **Pushover** вЂ” optional visitor notifications via env vars (`PUBLIC_PUSHOVER_TOKEN`, `PUBLIC_PUSHOVER_USER`, `PUBLIC_PUSHOVER_TITLE`, `PUBLIC_PUSHOVER_MESSAGE`). When set, the Pushover API is added to the CSP and notification scripts are loaded.
- **Cal.com** вЂ” booking widget integration
- **CSP** вЂ” dynamically built in `BaseLayout.astro`; update the corresponding source array when adding any external resource

## Content Collections (`src/content/`)

Schemas defined in `src/content/config.ts` using Zod. Run `npm run sync` after any change.

- `timeline/` вЂ” `title, company, startDate, endDate?, location?, tags[], highlight?`
- `projects/` вЂ” `title, summary, link?, repo?, tech[], featured?`
- `certs/` вЂ” `title, issuer, issued, credentialUrl?, skills[]`

Tags and skills arrays use consistent casing across entries (e.g., `"Dynamics 365"`, not `"dynamics365"`).

## Styling System

- **Colors:** `brand` (blue) В· `accent` (teal) В· `surface` (grays) В· `signal` (gold/amber) вЂ” always use Tailwind theme tokens, never raw color values
- **Fonts:** `font-sans` = Inter В· `font-heading` = Sora вЂ” both loaded as WOFF2 with `font-display: swap`
- **Elevation:** `shadow-soft` only вЂ” do not invent new shadows
- **CSS utilities:** `.card` (with `.card--on-dark`, `.card--resume`, `.card--compact` variants) В· `.section-title` В· `.nav-link`
- All animations MUST have `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` overrides
- Use `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` as the standard easing curve

## Common Pitfalls

- Never use `<a href="/page">` вЂ” always route through `base` or `to()` for GitHub Pages compatibility
- Don't add `<script>` tags without updating the CSP in `BaseLayout.astro`
- Don't import global CSS anywhere except `BaseLayout.astro`
- Content collection schema mismatches break the build вЂ” always validate with `npm run sync`
- Don't add `@font-face` declarations without also updating the preload links in `BaseLayout.astro`

## Maintenance

This file was generated by `@preflight`. Re-run `@preflight` when:
- Adding new frameworks, languages, or major integrations
- Upgrading Astro major versions
- Changing content collection schemas significantly
